---
title: "The AI Strategist"
---

We apply artificial intelligence and data science to corporate strategy, private equity value creation, and capital allocation.

**AI and data science applied to:**

- Market sizing, competitive positioning, and revenue forecasting
- Due diligence, operating diagnostics, and portfolio analytics
- Capital allocation, pricing, and operational benchmarking

Designed for investors, operators, and founders. This platform uses machine learning and quantitative methods to surface strategic insights, build decision tools, and turn data into durable enterprise value.

---

### Latest

**[The End of Intuition-Led Strategy](posts/foundational-thesis/)** -- A foundational essay on why strategy is moving from intuition to models, and what that means for how we allocate capital and build businesses.

[Browse all insights &rarr;](blog.qmd)
